sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n45151" key="eu)speirh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐσπειρής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n45151.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">well-coiled</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">δράκων</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.206</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (Antip. Sid.):—also <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὔσπειρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">well-wreathed</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κόρυμβοι</foreign> ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">219.3</biblScope> </bibl> (Antip.).</sense> </entryFree>
